userStories.title: Replace MICA_2023_1114 with canonical 32023R1114
acceptanceCriteria: Verify 32023R1114 on EUR-Lex from VPS; HTTP status must be 200.
Check whether a canonical norma row already exists with celex='32023R1114'.
If canonical row does not exist, insert codigo='32023R1114', celex='32023R1114', tipo_norma='reglamento_ue', vigente=true, publicacion_doue='2023-06-09', and EUR-Lex source URL.
Before deleting the weak row, update any obligacion_perfil references from MICA_2023_1114 to 32023R1114.
Delete norma.codigo='MICA_2023_1114'.
After completion, norma must have exactly the canonical 32023R1114 row populated and no MICA_2023_1114 row.
userStories.verificationCommand: COMPOSE='docker compose -f infra/deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml'; COUNT=$($COMPOSE exec postgres psql -U $PGUSER -d $PGDATABASE -tAc "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM norma WHERE celex='32023R1114' AND tipo_norma IS NOT NULL AND tipo_norma != ''"); WEAK=$($COMPOSE exec postgres psql -U $PGUSER -d $PGDATABASE -tAc "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM norma WHERE codigo='MICA_2023_1114'"); echo "Canonical: $COUNT, Weak: $WEAK"; [ "$COUNT" -ge 1 ] && [ "$WEAK" -eq 0 ] && echo PASS || echo FAIL

userStories.title: Create perfil casp in perfil_entidad
acceptanceCriteria: Inspect perfil_entidad columns before inserting.
Inspect existing perfiles to match local defaults and mandatory fields.
Insert codigo='casp', nombre='Proveedor de Servicios de Criptoactivos (CASP)', supervisor='CNMV'.
descripcion must identify CASP as an entity authorized by CNMV to provide one or more crypto-asset services under MiCA arts. 3.1.16 and 59.
Mention MiCA applies from 30 December 2024 and existing PSAV transitional period ends 30 December 2025.
Do not create emisor_token in Sprint M.
userStories.verificationCommand: COMPOSE='docker compose -f infra/deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml'; COUNT=$($COMPOSE exec postgres psql -U $PGUSER -d $PGDATABASE -tAc "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM perfil_entidad WHERE codigo='casp'"); echo "casp perfil: $COUNT"; [ "$COUNT" -eq 1 ] && echo PASS || echo FAIL

userStories.title: Seed base MiCA obligations for casp - arts. 59-76
acceptanceCriteria: Prerequisites: M-01 canonical 32023R1114 and M-02 perfil casp.
Load at least six verified CASP obligations with perfil_codigo='casp' and norma_codigo='32023R1114'.

Required obligations include art. 59 autorizacion CNMV, art. 65 capital, arts. 66-67 gobernanza/fit and proper, art. 70 custodia/segregacion, art. 81 continuidad, arts. 72-73 reporting/reclamaciones/conflictos, and art. 94 PBC/FT.
All rows must have source_url='https://eur-lex.europa.eu/legal-content/ES/TXT/?uri=CELEX:32023R1114'.
verified=true requires norma loaded, article confirmed, and source_url resolves.
PBC/FT obligation must be completeness='parcial' because concrete Spanish AML duties live outside MiCA.
userStories.verificationCommand: COMPOSE='docker compose -f infra/deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml'; COUNT=$($COMPOSE exec postgres psql -U $PGUSER -d $PGDATABASE -tAc "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM obligacion_perfil WHERE perfil_codigo='casp' AND norma_codigo='32023R1114'"); echo "casp MiCA obligations: $COUNT"; [ "$COUNT" -ge 6 ] && echo PASS || echo FAIL

userStories.title: Verify and load 3 MiCA RTS for CASP
acceptanceCriteria: Prerequisite: M-01 passed.
Verify each CELEX from VPS before inserting: HTTP 200 plus content match for 2023/1114, criptoactivos, CASP, or activos virtuales.

EUR-Lex may return 202 Accepted plus WAF challenge for plain curl. If that happens, retry with browser-like headers; if still blocked, use data.europa.eu ELI as the first fallback for content verification.
For example, CELEX 32025R0305 maps to https://data.europa.eu/eli/reg_del/2025/305/spa for structured Spanish metadata/content checks.
BOE DOUE Spanish mirror is an allowed fallback only when the concrete DOUE id is known.

If no automated source returns verifiable content, document the candidate as 'CELEX no verificable automaticamente - verificacion manual requerida' in docs/sprint-m-mica-report.md, mark M-04 with 0 RTS cargados, and only then mark M-04 as passed.
Stop when three confirmed MiCA CASP RTS/ITS have been loaded.
Do not load 32024R1681 or 32024R2656.

Insert each accepted act into norma with codigo=celex, tipo_norma='reglamento_delegado_ue', vigente=true, norma_padre_celex='32023R1114', EUR-Lex URL, and title/date fetched from source rather than assumed.
Link art. 62 and art. 81 CASP obligations to corresponding RTS using fuente_secundaria where the column exists.
Document accepted and rejected CELEXs in docs/sprint-m-mica-report.md.
If candidates fail content verification, document honestly instead of inflating counts.
userStories.verificationCommand: COMPOSE='docker compose -f infra/deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml'; COUNT=$($COMPOSE exec postgres psql -U $PGUSER -d $PGDATABASE -tAc "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM norma WHERE norma_padre_celex='32023R1114'"); echo "MiCA RTS loaded: $COUNT"; if [ "$COUNT" -ge 3 ]; then echo PASS; elif test -f docs/sprint-m-mica-report.md && grep -qi "0 RTS cargados" docs/sprint-m-mica-report.md && grep -qi "CELEX no verificable automaticamente" docs/sprint-m-mica-report.md; then echo PASS; else echo FAIL; fi

userStories.title: Add fail-closed MCP behavior for missing cripto data
acceptanceCriteria: Update MCP_TOOL_ROUTING_POLICY in mcp_catalog.py for CASP and crypto queries.
Policy must route CASP, criptoactivos, MiCA, activos virtuales, exchange cripto, wallet, and PSAV to obtener_obligaciones_perfil with perfil_codigo='casp'.
Policy must state that token/wallet/white-paper tables may be empty and this is expected.
Policy must tell the agent to answer from obtener_obligaciones_perfil and explicitly identify gaps instead of inventing unverified crypto obligations.
Update stdio tool description for obtener_obligaciones_perfil to include perfil_codigo='casp' and MiCA applicability from 30 December 2024.
Add apps/api/tests/test_mcp_casp_routing.py covering casp, PSAV, NO inventar, and tool description content.
userStories.verificationCommand: pytest apps/api/tests/test_mcp_casp_routing.py -v 2>&1 | tail -10 | grep -E 'passed|PASSED' && echo PASS || echo FAIL

userStories.title: Update mcp_validation_suite - MiCA CASP checks
acceptanceCriteria: mcp_validation_suite.py checks canonical 32023R1114, absence of MICA_2023_1114, perfil casp, >=6 CASP obligations, all CASP obligations verified, >=3 child RTS, art. 59, art. 70, PBC completeness parcial, and routing policy contains casp.

mcp_deep_contract_audit.py checks obtener_obligaciones_perfil('casp') returns >=6 items, all verified, includes norma_codigo='32023R1114', art. 59 notes mention autorizacion/CNMV, and buscar_norma_eu(celex='32023R1114') returns tipo_norma='reglamento_ue'.
Run both suites on VPS against the full corpus; ok=true is required.
userStories.verificationCommand: docker compose -f infra/deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml run --rm ops python mcp_validation_suite.py --read-only --base-url http://api:8000 2>&1 | grep 'ok=true' && docker compose -f infra/deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml run --rm ops python mcp_deep_contract_audit.py 2>&1 | grep 'ok=true' && echo PASS || echo FAIL

userStories.title: Final verification - Sprint M complete
acceptanceCriteria: M-01 through M-06 are complete.
Local full test suite passes with at least the current baseline of 3131 passed.
VPS /status reports api=ok and db=ok.
Alertmanager has 0 active alerts.
Branch feat/sprint-m-mica-casp is pushed.
docs/sprint-m-mica-report.md records CELEX accepted/rejected results and defers emisor_token to Sprint N.
docs/master-execution-roadmap.md records Sprint M complete.
Total obligacion_perfil is expected around 180+ with all rows verified after Sprint M.
userStories.verificationCommand: pytest apps/ -q --basetemp .pytest-tmp 2>&1 | tail -3 | grep 'passed' && docker compose -f infra/deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml exec postgres psql -U $PGUSER -d $PGDATABASE -tAc "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM perfil_entidad WHERE codigo='casp'" | grep -E '^1$' && echo PASS || echo FAIL
